name: Phase1 public project status
public_state: active edge development with published wiki, clean public link surface, and B3 emulator evidence set present
important_boundary: Percentages are planning estimates, not production-readiness or security-hardening claims. B3 GNU/Linux, UEFI, and kernel/initrd handoff emulator evidence are present, but full B3 validation remains not claimed until a reviewed validation report exists.

projects.name: Phase1 operator console
projects.state: usable edge console with guarded host access, VFS, dashboards, help UI, themes, learning, and tests
projects.next_milestone: polish release-facing flows and keep safe defaults simple

projects.name: Fyr native language
projects.state: seed language and toolchain surface exist with scripts, tests, assertions, package checks, and docs
projects.next_milestone: expand language book, package workflow, and runtime integration

projects.name: Base1 secure host / OS track
projects.state: documentation, dry-run scripts, release archives, validation gates, recovery planning, x86_64 boot planning, wiki guardrails, B3 GNU/Linux emulator evidence, B3 UEFI emulator proof, and B3 kernel/initrd handoff evidence are present; full B3 remains not claimed
projects.next_milestone: promote a reviewed B3 validation report without over-claiming, then move toward recovery and physical hardware evidence

projects.name: X200 / Libreboot hardware path
projects.state: X200 Linux-libre host can stage local kernel/initrd into B3 GNU/Linux emulator evidence, run B3 UEFI proof, and produce B3 kernel/initrd handoff evidence; USB staging, framebuffer proof paths, recovery notes, and safety gates remain evidence-bound
projects.next_milestone: capture repeatable physical boot evidence and keep emulator, USB, and hardware claims separated

projects.name: Security and crypto policy
projects.state: trust model, crypto policy roadmap, provider registry, profile docs, config schema, and integrity checks are present
projects.next_milestone: move from documentation policy into scoped implementation only after tests and review evidence

projects.name: Website and public docs
projects.state: public site, status page, status JSON, badge endpoint, native GitHub Wiki, refreshed source wiki, organized docs, asset policy, Pages routing, clean public link checks, and B3 emulator evidence-set status wording are in place
projects.next_milestone: publish the reviewed B3 validation report and keep public claims evidence-bound

projects.name: Repository organization
projects.state: minimal root has 12 tracked files, 16 top-level folders, 0 unplanned root files, 0 tracked build files, 0 root status duplicates, and clean Base1 link-check output
projects.next_milestone: keep generated artifacts out of Git and keep compatibility links clean as work lands

non_claims: B3 emulator evidence set is not full B3 completion without a reviewed validation report
